programmes.label: Programmes
programmes.title: Four levels of professional development.
programmes.lead: WPA programmes are structured as professional, non-degree certification pathways with clear progression.

level_1.title: Foundation Certificate Programme
level_1.text: For basic professional readiness, etiquette, protocol literacy and formal public behaviour.

level_2.title: Professional Certificate Programme
level_2.text: For state and diplomatic protocol, official visits, ceremonies and applied institutional communication.

level_3.title: Advanced Certificate Programme
level_3.text: For complex institutional settings, security-aware protocol, multilateral environments and advanced judgment.

level_4.title: Trainer / Advisor Certificate Programme
level_4.text: For future trainers, facilitators, advisors and institutional knowledge carriers.

certification.label: Certification
certification.title: Certification is based on structured completion and assessment.
certification.lead: WPA certificates are professional non-degree certificates. They do not represent university degrees or government accreditation.
certification.verification: Future verification may include serial numbers, QR verification and official certificate records.

pricing.note: Prices are indicative. Final pricing is confirmed officially by WPA.
pricing.disclaimer: These are indicative prices. The exact price depends on format, delivery mode, support level, language and institutional requirements.

student_desk.title: WPA Student Desk
student_desk.subtitle: Admissions · pricing · exams · certificates · procedure support
student_desk.description: The Student Desk guides candidates and institutions from first inquiry to programme choice, registration, assessment and certificate procedure.

institute.title: WPA Institute
institute.subtitle: Institute for Protocol, Diplomacy, Public Communication & Security Studies
institute.text: The Institute is the authority layer of WPA: research framework, methodology, analytics, benchmark, governance and publications.

footer.text: Independent digital academy and professional platform for protocol, diplomacy, public communication, security studies, certification and AI-assisted professional education.
footer.disclaimer: WPA offers structured professional non-degree education, certification pathways and institutional training. WPA does not claim to be a state diplomatic academy and does not issue university degrees.

hero.kicker: Independent Academy · Institutional Platform · AI-assisted Education
hero.title: A world academy for protocol, diplomacy and professional readiness.
hero.lead: World Protocol Academy connects professional education, certification, research, public communication, security-aware readiness, AI-assisted learning and institutional dignity into one disciplined global platform.

thesis.label: Central thesis
thesis.title: WPA is designed as an institutional ecosystem, not a collection of webpages.
thesis.lead: This candidate combines the seriousness of a world-level academic institution with the energy of a modern digital platform.
thesis.quote: Protocol is not ceremony alone. It is order, readiness, dignity, public discipline and institutional intelligence.
